artifacts.code:
#!/bin/bash
# Verify math_utils/__init__.py exists and is empty or whitespace-only
echo "Checking existence of math_utils/__init__.py..."
if [ ! -f "math_utils/__init__.py" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: math_utils/__init__.py does not exist."
    exit 1
fi
echo "File exists. Checking content..."
if [ $(wc -c < "math_utils/__init__.py") -eq 0 ] || [ -z "$(cat math_utils/__init__.py | tr -d '[:space:]')" ]; then
    echo "SUCCESS: math_utils/__init__.py is empty or contains only whitespace."
else
    echo "WARNING: math_utils/__init__.py contains non-whitespace content."
    cat math_utils/__init__.py
    exit 2
fi

task.title: Create math_utils/__init__.py
task.description: Initialize the math_utils package by creating an empty __init__.py file in the math_utils directory.

artifacts.code:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Check if math_utils/__init__.py exists and is empty or whitespace-only
echo "Checking existence of math_utils/__init__.py..."
if [ ! -f "math_utils/__init__.py" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: math_utils/__init__.py does not exist."
    exit 1
fi

echo "File exists. Checking content..."
if [[ -s "math_utils/__init__.py" ]]; then
    # Check if file contains only whitespace
    if grep -q '^[[:space:]]*$' "math_utils/__init__.py"; then
        echo "SUCCESS: math_utils/__init__.py contains only whitespace (as expected)."
    else
        echo "ERROR: math_utils/__init__.py contains non-whitespace content."
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "SUCCESS: math_utils/__init__.py is empty."
fi

echo "Validation passed: math_utils/__init__.py is correctly structured."
